projects.name: Multithreaded HTTP/1.1 Server
projects.description: A lightweight HTTP server written in pure C with POSIX threads for concurrent connection handling. Features Apache Common Log Format logging, path traversal protection, keep-alive connections.

projects.name: Al-Moanes
projects.description: An Islamic Quran recitation web app with Arabic/English RTL/LTR support, custom audio player, and newsletter via Google Apps Script.
